About me

Hello, I'm Sanjeewa Madurawala, a Data Analytics Engineer and BI specialist based in Sri Lanka. I focus on enterprise Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, operational analytics, and AI-assisted development workflows that help teams make faster, better decisions.

Current focus

I am a Power BI Engineer at Raketman (Vandermarliere Family of Cigars, Belgium), where I own and deliver reporting across supply chain, logistics, inventory, production, and finance—from SAP-integrated operational dashboards to group-level visibility for leadership and shop-floor teams.

Previous experience

Before that, I spent over two years at Dialog Network Services in Analytics & Automation, building operational analytics for telecom infrastructure, disaster recovery, SLA management, and workforce operations.

Background

My path started in electrical engineering (BSc, University of Moratuwa, Second Class Upper, GPA 3.64) and plant operations across power generation and manufacturing—including 3.3 MW biomass and 100 MW thermal plants—before moving fully into data and BI. I completed an OTHM Level 7 Diploma in Data Science in 2024.

Certifications

  • DP-600 Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate — In progress

Memberships & publications

  • AMIE (SL) — Institution of Engineers Sri Lanka
  • AENG — Engineering Council Sri Lanka
  • Published paper at ICIAFS 2014 on harmonic mitigation systems
